calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Construing Trust Instrument, To Compel Accounting, To Contest Purported Amendment To Trust, To Surcharge Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Off Calendar

Petiton For Order Approving Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Lawless for Lenore Long (Respondent). John Boessenceker for Petitioner.

The Court stated that it thinks the matter is fine but it does not think that CCP 877 applies. In addition, the Court stated that it is prepared to approve the settlement but perhaps the way to proceed is to put in that Shawn Cohen and Kira James received notice, that they did not appear and that they did not object. Ms. Lawless stated that all deeds were in the Trust, and that $150,000.00 will have to go into the Trust and then distributed. The Court granted the Petition for Order Approving Settlement (subject to review of the order). Mr. Boessenecker will file a Request for Dismissal of the Petition for Order Construing Trust Instrument, etc. within 5-days.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Construing Trust Instrument, To Compel Accounting, To Contest Purported Amendment To Trust, To Surcharge Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Continued To Dec-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Continued To Nov-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Sep-11-2012 Continued To Oct-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Construing Trust Instrument, To Compel Accounting, To Contest Purported Amendment To Trust, To Surcharge Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Continued To Sep-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Respondent L. Lomg'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of William Amarl.
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret Baumgartner for the City and County of San Francisco (CCSF). Anthony Matricciani for and with Ms. Long.

The Court presents the following disclosure to Counsel: the Court's wife is Catharine Barnes, that Ms. Barnes is a Deputy City Attorney for the City and County of San Francisco, that the Court doesn't view her employment as a recusal but that it wanted to present the disclosure to Counsel. Mr. Matricciani stated that he had no issues with regard to the disclosure. The motion was presented and argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court GRANTED the Motion to Compel the Deposition as follows: granted as to questions with regard to Ms. James physical presentation only; excludes records or contents of discussions. Mr. Matricciani is to prepare the order and is to submit it to Ms. Baumgartner for approval.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Construing Trust Instrument, To Compel Accounting, To Contest Purported Amendment To Trust, To Surcharge Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-28-2012 Continued To Jul-10-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Construing Trust Instrument, To Compel Accounting, To Contest Purported Amendment To Trust, To Surcharge Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-23-2011 Continued To Mar-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Lawless for and with Lenore Long. John Boessenecker for Petitioners.

The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than March 23, 2012. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by March 23, 2012. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on March 28, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
